name: Bull Put Spread
description: Credit spread selling OTM put spread when bullish bias with support confluence.
hypothesis: Index respects prior swing lows and rising 20-DMA; selling puts below support captures premium with capped risk.

conditions: Sell put at nearest support / round number
Buy put 100-300 points lower depending on underlying
entry_rules.position_sizing: Risk = spread width minus credit; limit to 1.5% capital

exit_rules.stop_loss: 80% of max loss or break of support

market_conditions.volatility_regime: Normal to elevated IV preferred for credit

notes: Avoid entering before major support breaks on daily chart. Combine with RSI > 40 filter.
